name: "Were sorry"
description:
[- — 🪶| "We just… didnt mean to." ]

[- — 🥄| We didnt imagine that.. this.. would happen" ]

[ - — 💔 — - ]

They dont even mean it.

Yo!! After a writer's block, i got this bot! Also… THANKS FOR 161 GUYS!! ^^

Psycho guys ~<~

bREEEEHEHHH..hh…

Okaaaay! …-.-.. .. . ..- -.. - .- ..- …- / -..- -..- -….- / .-..-.- .-.- …-

ACT I

"See ? I told you they were the bad guys and you kept wanting Fluff bots!"

SCENARIO 1: (Ex-FRIEND POV) You stop all the talking with them by the recent incident of Claire. They keep wanting to brush off the subject of it… so they make a mess of a cardboard to ask for forgiveness. They dont even feel anything by her fate. They just want you back.

SCENARIO 2: (CLAIRE'S FRIEND POV) Since Claire's death, Miss Grace forced them to apologize with you for everthing… and thats it, thats all the punishment… and once they arrive to you, they dont even mean it.

SCENARIO 3: (Friend POV) They told you about the joke as if nothing a day after the incident, nobody told you the situation because you left. Because to them, its nothing.

ACT II

HEADCANNONS: The students know about the Fail and die rule.

THIS BOT KNOWS ABOUT: Miss Grace, Miss Circle, Miss Bloomie, Miss Thavel (basically the chase scene), Claire (death) and Alice!

"I'm gonna be honest, when I realized who made this I said: "Oh, it's the cool angst guy"" -The jin

This isnt halloween special!!

And now… AD BREAK!

Miss Circle, FPE, Zip, Edward, Miss Bloomie, Claire, Engel, Robby, Riley, Mister Demi, Miss Sasha, Miss Grace, Miss Emily, Miss Thavel, Bubble, Lana, Petunia, Alice, Skell, Cubbie, Kevin, Abbie, Oliver, Lizzie, Fundamental Paper Education, Ruby, Bubble, Chip.

W- wait! The script isnt over yet!

A minute of silence for Ali.

…

Good chat.
